text: LUCASFILM Ltd.
"Rey stands in the desert, scanning the horizon, lightsaber hilt at her waist."
original_texts: Rey stands in a desert landscape, wearing a light-colored outfit with arm wraps. Mountains are visible in the background.
Rey looks determined, scanning the horizon. Her hair is tied back, and she holds a lightsaber hilt at her waist.

text: Every generation has a legend
"Desert landscape with distant mountains. Rey, with lightsaber, looks focused. A vehicle speeds by. Rey assumes a defensive stance, then sprints, glancing over her shoulder."
original_texts: A vast desert landscape with scattered rocks and distant mountains.
A fast-moving vehicle speeds across the desert.
Rey stands holding a lightsaber, looking focused.
Rey assumes a defensive stance with her lightsaber ignited.
Close-up of gloved hands gripping a vehicle's controls.
Rey turns and looks determinedly over her shoulder.
Rey's feet sprint across the sandy terrain.

text: "Figure runs with blue saber, vehicle speeds in."
original_texts: A figure runs across a vast desert landscape, holding a blue lightsaber. The sky is filled with clouds, and rocky formations are visible in the distance.
A vehicle approaches quickly from the right, stirring up dust as it moves toward the running figure.

text: "Rey leaps over the TIE fighter."
original_texts: Rey, with a blue lightsaber, stands in a desert with a large mechanical structure behind her.
Rey runs forward as a TIE fighter approaches rapidly from behind.
Rey leaps into the air, performing a flip over the TIE fighter.

text: This Christmas
"Blue light flies through misty mountains, lighting terrain."
original_texts: Dark, misty landscape with jagged, rocky mountains partially obscured by clouds.
A small, bright blue light appears, moving swiftly through the mist near the mountains.
The blue light reveals itself as a flying vehicle, illuminating the rocky terrain below.
The vehicle continues to navigate through the fog, with golden lights visible on the ground beneath.

text: Cloaked fighter triumphs over armored opponent.
original_texts: A character in a dark cloak wields a red lightsaber in a forest with tall, bare trees. The scene is lit with a red hue, giving it an ominous appearance.
The character engages in combat with a large, armored opponent, swinging the red lightsaber with force.
The armored opponent is knocked back and falls to the ground, with the red lightsaber glowing intensely.

text: "Lightsaber clash. Welding helmet. Man in desert. BB-8 with droid. Smiling in hyperspace."
original_texts: Sparks fly as a red lightsaber clashes with another object, creating a bright flash.
A character with gloved hands welds pieces of a helmet together, red lines glowing at the seams.
In a desert landscape, a young man with short hair looks up, a rocky cliff behind him. Another character stands above on the cliff.
BB-8, the spherical droid, stands next to a smaller green and white droid in a dimly lit room.
Inside a spaceship cockpit, a character with long hair sits next to another person. They are traveling through a blue hyperspace tunnel.
A man with a headset smiles broadly in the cockpit, surrounded by glowing control panels.
The spaceship speeds through hyperspace, blue and white streaks filling the screen.

text: THE SAGA COMES TO AN END
Explosion hits armored figure; C-3PO and man flee quickly.
original_texts: A desert landscape with rocky formations and a clear sky. An explosion occurs, sending a cloud of sand into the air.
A figure in white armor is propelled from the explosion, surrounded by dust and debris.
A vehicle speeds through the desert, carrying several passengers. Sparks fly as they maneuver sharply.
A golden droid, C-3PO, stands on the vehicle. A man in a scarf is steering, gripping the controls tightly.
original_text: "Explosion blasts armor-clad figure; C-3PO and man escape fast."

text: Hands hold a detailed golden medal.
original_text: A pair of hands holds a golden medal with intricate designs.

text: Two women hug; one has braided hair.
original_text: A woman with braided hair embraces another woman in a heartfelt hug.

text: A woman in white leads a group, including a droid, across a grassy field.
original_text: Several characters, including a woman in a white outfit, walk across a grassy field. A droid and other companions follow.

text: Rey stands on a cliff, facing waves with the misty remains of the Death Star in the distance.
original_text: Rey stands on a grassy cliff, facing turbulent waves. In the distance, a massive, partially destroyed structure resembling the Death Star looms in the mist.

text: "Waves hit rocks."
original_texts: The ocean waves crash against the rocky shore, adding to the dramatic atmosphere.

text: STAR WARS
THE RISE OF SKYWALKER
DECEMBER
